name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help improve and fix the mod!

---

Experiencing a bug and dont have Discord? Heres a free template!

**Version of the Mod**
Can be found in the Mods section in-game (ie v3.0)

**Version of the client**
Can be found on the cmd prompt and on the console dialogue (ie r4503)

**Describe the bug**
Describe the issue youre having.

**Any Errors? If so, post them here!**
Can do screenshots of logs, screenshots of errors, clips of the issue at hand, and crash dumps. Dont need them all but it may help solve the issue!

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
